MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA, & UTAH's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar per the request of the moving party. Plaintiff filed a dismissal of the entire action on April 17, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
